text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, the day of the autumn Tenno<n>Sho arrives.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Good luck out there today, Opera O!<n>You too, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You too, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even the normally reserved Meisho<n>Doto is in
high spirits for today's<n>momentous race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Well met, Digital!<n>Welcome to my
coronation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I acknowledge your efforts. You've<n>made
astonishing leaps of progress,<n>and now, here you
are, right on our<n>tails.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But you know as well as I that your<n>skills are still
lacking!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the Centurial Overlord! And over<n>a
medium-distance track of turf, my<n>power is
absolute!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're... absolutely correct.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, she appears on the<n>brink of
admitting defeat. However...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You are indeed the Overlord... I have<n>to
acknowledge our difference in skill<n>if I'm going to
cause an upset.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And now, having acknowledged it, I<n>will find a
way... a means to catch up...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. No amount of thinking will save<n>you. You
have already crossed the<n>Rubicon.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! What could possibly<n>happen to
offer you the advantage<n>now?! What scheme can
you<n>produce?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Plip, plop...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What... strate—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Psssshhhh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Is this... rain?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Rain?! Heaven weeps...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A sudden bout of rain hits. While not<n>exactly a
storm, it may affect the<n>track.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As the ground becomes more damp...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This rain... Does it symbolize the<n>crying of my
beloved Umas?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No... These must be tears of joy,<n>celebrating my
triumph.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am the All-Rounder. There's no path<n>that I've
shied away from on my<n>journey to this stage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And in this final moment, the entrance<n>to the
narrow path only I can run has<n>shown its face!
The heavens have<n>finally smiled upon me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho on... soft turf...<n>Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After all the roads I've run to get<n>here, poor turf is
like a walk in the<n>park! Plus, I'm quite at home in
the<n>water after all my time spent in the<n>ocean of
Uma simping!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With this turn of events, I'm bound to<n>win! Shower
me in your love, o gods!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Fshaaaaahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It begins to pour. The sky's gone<n>completely dark,
save for a beam of<n>light shining down on Agnes
Digital.
